_notes: Literature-default pose-estimator degradation for the estskel variant.
jitter_sigma_m=0.015 -> torso ~15mm, end-effectors ~35mm (x2.3) per-joint Gaussian, matching typical AlphaPose+MotionBERT lift error.
temporal_smooth_alpha=0.35: causal EMA mimicking MotionBERT temporal smoothing.
occlusion_rate_per_joint=0.02/s with geometric mean run 6 frames: missed detections / occlusion gaps, linearly interpolated.
RECALIBRATE against real custom AlphaPose extract_skeleton output when available (see plan open-items).
